rationale.R1.6: The writing is clear and concise but could benefit from minor adjustments for perfect flow.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident without explicit uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including the verification of counts and fractions.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content introduced; minor changes do not introduce regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
